name: vkcode-ai
description: On-device AI for vkcode: inline chat, inline suggestions and commit messages powered by a local Qwen model. No account, no sign-in.

vkcode.ai.enabled.description: Master switch for vkcode's on-device AI. When off, inline chat, inline suggestions and commit-message generation do not use the model.

vkcode.ai.model.description: Absolute path to the local GGUF model file used by vkcode AI.

vkcode.ai.contextSize.markdownDescription: Context window for the local model. `auto` picks the largest size that fits your available VRAM (recommended). Or set a number of tokens to cap it (lower it if you hit out-of-memory errors).

vkcode.ai.thinking.description: Let the local model reason step-by-step before answering (Qwen3 thinking mode). Slower, and the reasoning is shown as a separate quote. When off, the model answers directly.

vkcode.inlineSuggest.enabled.description: Provide inline (ghost text) code suggestions from the local model. Also requires editor.inlineSuggest.enabled.

vkcode.commitMessage.enabled.description: Show the local 'Generate Commit Message' action in the Source Control input.
